text.title: interview-methods Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for interview-methods as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Sending reference-check questions via agent without logging candidate consent in the ATS.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: FCRA (US), GDPR (EU), and UK GDPR require documented consent before conducting third-party reference checks. Auto-send without consent logging is a compliance violation.

failure-mode.description: Bias silent in the questions an agent picks rather than the language used.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Historical hiring data biases the bank toward what already worked; explicit bias review and cross-cultural calibration are necessary safeguards.

failure-mode.description: STAR scoring assuming US-grad-style narrative conventions.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cross-cultural pragmatics vary; agent scoring must account for regional communication style differences, not penalize non-Western candidates for narrative structure.
